contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Backtest explainer pages: illustrative per-strategy charts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1077
  
  Details:
  Added an illustrative chart at the top of each /backtest/strategy/:key explainer page: it runs the real client-side engine on a deterministic synthetic price path (rise/fall/rise/fall) and marks entries (green) / exits (red), with the rule's overlay — SMA line (trend), Donchian channel (breakout), RSI panel with 30/70 guides (mean-reversion), MACD panel with signal (momentum), markers on price (buy & hold, rebalance band). Validated in node that each strategy fires both an entry and an exit; rendered all six pages in the prod env to confirm markup. Deployed via ./deploy.sh --ror-only.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
